inputs.label: Total Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total sales income before any deductions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total sales income before any deductions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir kesintiden önceki toplam satış geliri.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu total des ventes avant toute déduction.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingresos totales por ventas antes de deducciones.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي دخل المبيعات قبل أي استقطاعات.

inputs.label: Cost of Goods Sold
inputs.businessContext: Direct costs attributable to the production of goods sold.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct costs attributable to the production of goods sold.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satılan malların üretimine doğrudan atfedilebilen maliyetler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Kosten, die der Herstellung der verkauften Waren zuzurechnen sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts directs attribuables à la production des biens vendus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos directos atribuibles a la producción de bienes vendidos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكاليف المباشرة المنسوبة إلى إنتاج البضائع المباعة.

inputs.label: Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Expenses incurred from normal business operations like rent, utilities, salaries.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expenses incurred from normal business operations like rent, utilities, salaries.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kira, kamu hizmetleri, maaşlar gibi normal iş operasyonlarından kaynaklanan giderler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aufwendungen aus dem normalen Geschäftsbetrieb wie Miete, Nebenkosten, Gehälter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses liées aux opérations commerciales normales comme le loyer, les services publics, les salaires.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos incurridos por operaciones comerciales normales como alquiler, servicios públicos, salarios.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المصاريف الناتجة عن العمليات التجارية العادية مثل الإيجار والمرافق والرواتب.

inputs.label: Tax Expense
inputs.businessContext: Income tax owed based on taxable income.

businessContext_i18n.en: Income tax owed based on taxable income.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergiye tabi gelir üzerinden ödenmesi gereken gelir vergisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einkommensteuer, die auf das zu versteuernde Einkommen geschuldet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Impôt sur le revenu dû sur le revenu imposable.
businessContext_i18n.es: Impuesto sobre la renta adeudado según la renta imponible.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ضريبة الدخل المستحقة على أساس الدخل الخاضع للضريبة.
